title.zh: 精密塑胶注塑与模具一站式方案

subtitle.en: From mold design to mass production, Heanxin delivers custom injection parts, insert molding and hardware-plastic combined components for OEM / ODM customers.
subtitle.zh: 从模具设计到批量生产，禾安鑫为 OEM / ODM 客户提供定制注塑件、嵌件注塑及五金塑胶组合件。

desc.en: Mold development, injection molding and assembly under one roof.
desc.zh: 模具开发、注塑成型与组装一体化。

desc.en: Full-process inspection from incoming material to shipment.
desc.zh: 从来料到出货的全流程检验。

desc.en: Flexible customization for global brands and buyers.
desc.zh: 为全球品牌与买家提供灵活定制。

title.zh: 值得信赖的塑胶制造伙伴

body.en: Heanxin specializes in plastic injection molding, mold development and hardware-plastic combined parts. We support customers from product idea and DFM analysis through to tooling, mass production and quality assurance.
body.zh: 禾安鑫专注于塑胶注塑、模具开发与五金塑胶组合件，协助客户从产品构想、可制造性分析，到模具开发、批量生产与品质保证的全流程落地。
